title: Minimal Fixture Card
moat: A single irreversible adjacency rewrite forces route planning.

loop_skeleton.description: Plant a seed, water to rewrite adjacency.

depth_mechanisms.name: adjacency rewrite
depth_mechanisms.mechanism: Water swaps edge sets between tiles.
depth_mechanisms.falsifiable_claim: Without water-order planning, clear rates stay flat.

depth_mechanisms.name: wilt clock
depth_mechanisms.mechanism: Unlit plants wilt out in three ticks.
depth_mechanisms.falsifiable_claim: Removing wilt drops solve time over 30%.

feel_signature: Short irreversible commits; failure is a dark bed.
second_session_answer: Return to re-route through yesterday's water scars.
packaging_lessons: Ship one bed before meta layers.
anti_lessons: Do not add XP to hide adjacency mistakes.

citations.claim: Synthetic minimal fixture for schema registry.
